He wears a vibrant orange varsity bomber jacket with embroidered patches, a clean white t-shirt, black cargo pants, layered silver necklaces, and orange high-top canvas sneakers. A retro black payphone is mounted on the wall. Modern editorial graphic elements, motivational stickers, handwritten doodles, barcode label, signature mark, and magazine-style layout details are integrated throughout the composition.
